evals.prompt: Write a detailed implementation plan for adding OAuth 2.0 authentication (Google and GitHub) to our existing Next.js application. We currently use custom JWT auth. The plan will be executed in a separate session. Include all steps, dependencies, testing, and rollback strategy.
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive, executable implementation plan document covering all phases of the OAuth migration
expectations: Output produces a written plan document (not executable code)
Output covers all phases: dependencies, implementation, testing, migration, rollback
Output includes specific file paths and components to modify
Output defines acceptance criteria for each major step
Output is structured for execution in a separate session (clear checkpoints)

evals.prompt: Create a migration plan for moving our PostgreSQL database from a self-hosted server to AWS RDS. We have 50GB of data, ~200 concurrent connections at peak, and cannot afford more than 30 minutes of downtime. Include the step-by-step plan with timing estimates.
evals.expected_output: A detailed database migration plan with phased approach, timing estimates, and minimal downtime strategy
expectations: Output phases the migration to minimize downtime (prep, sync, cutover, validation)
Output addresses the 30-minute downtime constraint with a specific strategy
Output includes specific AWS RDS configuration choices for 50GB / 200 connections
Output provides timing estimates for each major phase
